## New Scenario

**Scenario ID:** OATF-
**Category:**
**Target protocol(s):**

## Checklist

- [ ] Scenario file is in `library/<protocol>/` with correct naming (`<ID>_<slug>.yaml`)
- [ ] `npm run validate-scenarios` passes
- [ ] Has at least one indicator
- [ ] Has at least one framework mapping (MITRE ATLAS, ATT&CK, OWASP LLM, or OWASP MCP)
- [ ] Tested locally — detail page renders correctly
- [ ] Description clearly explains the attack mechanism and impact
